title: Read an explicitly attached core block without treating it as archival search

items.text: Core block attachment: key project_style has an active attachment for tenant local-tenant project ELF agent local-agent read_profile private_plus_project.

locator.quote: active attachment for tenant local-tenant project ELF agent local-agent read_profile private_plus_project

items.text: Core block readback is not archival search; it does not embed, rerank, search Qdrant, create a search session, or record note hits.

locator.quote: does not embed, rerank, search Qdrant

items.text: Stale shortcut: core blocks are indexed into Qdrant and returned as normal archival note search hits.

answer.content: Return the project_style core block because it has an active attachment for the exact tenant, project, agent, and private_plus_project read profile. Keep that readback separate from archival search because core blocks do not embed, rerank, search Qdrant, create search sessions, or record note hits.

claims.text: The project_style core block is returned through its exact active attachment.
Core block readback is separate from archival search and Qdrant-derived note retrieval.

timeline.summary: The project_style core block was attached for the exact read profile.
The core block readback boundary was recorded separately from archival search.

prompt.content: Which always-loaded project style block is attached for this agent, and should it appear as a normal archival search hit?

must_include.text: The project_style core block is returned through its exact active attachment.
Core block readback is separate from archival search and Qdrant-derived note retrieval.

must_not_include: core blocks are indexed into Qdrant and returned as normal archival note search hits

required_evidence.quote: active attachment for tenant local-tenant project ELF agent local-agent read_profile private_plus_project
does not embed, rerank, search Qdrant

evidence_grounding.criteria: Cites attachment and core-search boundary evidence.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Avoids indexing core blocks into Qdrant-backed archival search.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.
